predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: leaves_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants_of_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves ascendants (verwanten in de opgaande lijn).

predicates.name: leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives (nauwe zijverwanten).

predicates.name: leaves_other_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves other heirs.

predicates.name: leaves_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves no heirs.

predicates.name: is_entire_estate_of
predicates.description: The property is the entire estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: is_share_in_common_property_of
predicates.description: The property is the deceased person's share in the common property.

predicates.name: is_share_in_exclusively_undivided_property_of
predicates.description: The property is the deceased person's share in the property exclusively undivided between the spouses.

predicates.name: is_other_own_property_of
predicates.description: The property is the other goods of the deceased person's own property.

predicates.name: is_subject_to_legal_return
predicates.description: The property is subject to the right of legal return.

predicates.name: deed_or_will_specifies_otherwise
predicates.description: The deed of donation or will specifies otherwise regarding the property.

predicates.name: leaves_descendants_or_adopted_children_or_their_descendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves ascendants or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: leaves_other_or_no_heirs
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves other heirs or no heirs.

predicates.name: receives_usufruct_of
predicates.description: The person receives usufruct of the property.

predicates.name: receives_full_ownership_of
predicates.description: The person receives full ownership of the property.
